# Anil Unni

Lead Engineer & Product Builder specializing in high-performance digital products, scalable enterprise architectures, and developer workflow optimization.

## Info
- **Role:** Lead Full-Stack Engineer & Technical Lead
- **Location:** Kerala, India
- **Focus:** Scalable architectures, developer productivity, AI-assisted workflows, and team leadership
- **Website:** https://anilunni.me
- **Email:** anilunni@outlook.com
- **Socials:**
  - GitHub: https://github.com/anil-unni
  - LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/anilunni

## Core Philosophy & Mindset
Anil bridges the gap between software development and strategic commercial value. He operates under three key pillars:
1. **Team Leadership:** Guiding high-performance engineering groups, facilitating mentorship, and optimizing technical execution pipelines.
2. **Enterprise Architecture:** Designing highly resilient backend networks, database architecture, and scalable modern web applications.
3. **Product Strategy:** Bridging the gap between software specifications and strategic commercial value to deliver memorable products.

## Disciplines & Toolkit
- **Engineering:** Scalable application blueprints, API design, microservices orchestration, and dynamic UI component development.
- **Leadership:** Sprint planning, code reviews, technical roadmapping, developer mentoring, and agile methodology.
- **Toolkit:** Next.js, React, Node.js, TypeScript, Python, Django, FastAPI, SQL, PostgreSQL, Docker, and modern AI development tooling (e.g., Cursor, MCP, LLM integrations).

## Selected Works
- **Enterprise Business Suite**
  - *Role/Tags:* ERP, Full-Stack, Lead
  - *Description:* Architecture and UI development for a comprehensive business management suite featuring HRMS, accounting, and task modules.
- **FinTax Compliance Platform**
  - *Role/Tags:* Backend, API, FinTech
  - *Description:* Engineered backend services and strict compliance adherence for digital tax requirement integrations.
- **Global Travel Portal**
  - *Role/Tags:* Web, UI/UX, Booking
  - *Description:* Development of custom download architectures and secure itinerary generation for a B2B/B2C travel booking suite.
